steps.title: Write each round total
steps.content: Each first-round correct response is worth $3$ points, so $f$ of them are worth $3f$ points. Each second-round correct response is worth $7$ points, so $s$ of them are worth $7s$ points.

steps.title: Use at least points
steps.content: The contestant needs at least $120$ points, so the total must be greater than or equal to $120$. $$3f+7s\ge120$$ The answer is B.
